subcodes.first_line: O thou who dost diffuse the fragrances of the realm of being! When the luminous morn was illumined from the Abhá Kingdom, the rays of the Sun of Truth shone forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناشر نفحات افق وجود چون بصبح نورانی از ملکوت ابهی منور گشت پرتو شمس حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @belief and denial, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @light and darkness, @methods of teaching the Cause, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
